module.collect_supplies.description:
### Tips
        * Stamina from the Supply Station and friends will be collected by default.
        * When redeem codes are enabled, the program will automatically fetch and redeem available online codes.
        * Online redeem codes are maintained by the developer and may have update delays.
module.collect_supplies.log.兑换码已全部兑换: All redeem codes have been redeemed
module.collect_supplies.log.购买每日物资配给箱超时: Timed out while purchasing Daily Supply Crate
module.collect_supplies.log.配置数据为空或格式不正确: Configuration data is empty or invalid, unable to retrieve redeem codes
module.collect_supplies.log.领取好友体力超时: Timed out while collecting friend stamina
module.collect_supplies.log.领取宿舍拼图超时: Timed out while claiming dormitory fragments
module.collect_supplies.log.领取邮箱资源超时: Timed out while claiming mail rewards
module.collect_supplies.log.领取鱼饵超时: Timed out while claiming fishing bait
module.collect_supplies.title: Collect Supplies
module.task_collect_supplies.description:
### Tips
        * Stamina from the Supply Station and friends will be collected by default.
        * When redeem codes are enabled, the program will automatically fetch and redeem available online codes.
        * Online redeem codes are maintained by the developer and may have update delays.
